summary: PromptEditor 三 RAG 格式识别 + RagChipEditor 可视化编辑器

decisions.title: 识别 [[]]/<<>>/《《》》 三种 RAG 格式而非合并为一类
decisions.rationale: RAGDiaryPlugin 底层对三者处理语义不同（无条件 / 相似度 / 混合阈值），前端显式区分让用户能正确配置
tradeoffs: chip 分类多（3 种 Rag kind）
换来和后端语义一致的精确性

rejected_alternatives.option: 合并为单一 Rag 类型 + 下拉选择符号
rejected_alternatives.reason: 用户可能在同一提示词里混用三种符号，chip 独立更直观

decisions.title: VCP 工具占位符白名单机制（Tool 分类）
decisions.rationale: 预设 Agent 提示词硬编码 {{VCPDailyNoteEditor}} 等工具占位符，但对应插件可能未装；报 ⚠️ 警告体验差，识别 VCP 前缀作为已知惯例可消除虚警
tradeoffs: 未装插件时展开为空串（但用户有心理预期）
比纯粹报警告好
side_effects: 显示友好提示“当前未安装 XXX 插件”

decisions.title: RagChipEditor 独立子组件 + 4 tab
decisions.rationale: 编辑器逻辑复杂（三 RAG + 元思考 + 原始模式）；抽出子组件保持 PromptEditor 主文件不臃肿
tradeoffs: 组件间通过 emit + props 通信，略有仪式感
换来可独立测试和复用

decisions.title: 日记本名称分组快速选择（仿 agent 管理页）
decisions.rationale: 小白不记中文名，直接点 chip 最友好；数据源 /admin_api/dailynotes/folders 与 agent 管理页一致，避免维护两套
side_effects: Agent diary 推断命名用  约定（上游 RAGDiaryPlugin 默认命名）

decisions.title: V8 TagMemo 完整家族 UI（TagMemo / TagMemo+ / TagMemo0.x / TagMemo+0.x）
decisions.rationale: RAGDiaryPlugin.js line 2293 定义 4 种组合；UI 用「启用 + 权重模式（动态/固定）+ 测地线复选」三组件覆盖
assumptions: 上游不会再加新 TagMemo 变种（否则 UI 要扩展）

decisions.title: ragParser.ts 独立于组件
decisions.rationale: 解析/序列化纯函数，抽出 utils 便于单元测试（未来可加），避免 RagChipEditor 臃肿

bugs.symptom: PromptEditor 里 {{VarTimelineNova}} 报 ⚠️ 未识别
bugs.root_cause: TimelineOrganizer 未装时 config.env 没有该 Var；PromptEditor 只从 placeholders API 查无匹配就报警告
bugs.fix: bootstrap 在本体 TimelineOrganizer initialize 阶段自动预注册占位符 + 前端 Tool 分类白名单兜底
bugs.lesson: 前端警告应区分“真未识别”和“插件可选但未装”

bugs.symptom: Vue 编译器解析 {{ "{{Var...}}" }} 模板时报 mustache 嵌套错误
bugs.root_cause: Vue 模板中双 mustache 嵌套，字符串字面量里的 {{ }} 被误当模板标签
bugs.fix: 改用 v-text="placeholderExample" + 计算属性返回拼接字符串（）
bugs.lesson: 任何含 {{ 或 }} 字面量的模板内容都要走 v-text 或动态绑定，不能直接写在 mustache 插值里

summary: Agent 工具系统小白提示 + Toolbox 工具集可视化集成

decisions.title: 「一键全工具」按钮独立于「插入变量」弹窗
decisions.rationale: {{VCPAllTools}} 是最常用的零维护工具注入占位符，小白不应该为了找它去翻分类 tab；工具栏一级按钮让访问成本降到 1 click
tradeoffs: 工具栏多一个按钮视觉噪音
换来 90% 常用场景秒完成

rejected_alternatives.option: 只在弹窗里的「全工具列表」tab 提供
rejected_alternatives.reason: 小白不知道 tab 分类，大概率找不到

decisions.title: Toolbox 识别走本地 toolbox map + alias Set（而不加到 placeholders API）
decisions.rationale: Toolbox 和 VCP 工具是两套独立机制——messageProcessor 走 toolboxManager.isToolbox() 而非 placeholders 管线；前端对称地从 /admin_api/toolbox/map 单独拉能保持架构清晰
tradeoffs: 多一次 HTTP 请求（onMounted 并行加载）
换来语义隔离，改动可控

rejected_alternatives.option: 修改后端 placeholders.js 加 toolbox 类型
rejected_alternatives.reason: Toolbox 有特权角色限定 + 全局去重 + 循环保护等独立语义，塞进 placeholders 列表会混淆两种不同机制

decisions.title: 正则扩展支持 {{toolbox:alias}} 含冒号格式
decisions.rationale: messageProcessor 源码同时接受 {{alias}} 和 {{toolbox:alias}} 两种写法；用户已有文档里两种都有，前端识别必须对齐
side_effects: classify 加 toolbox: 前缀识别
htmlToText 天然支持（chip.dataset.var 存原始含冒号别名）

decisions.title: Dismissible localStorage 提示卡片（不是永久置顶）
decisions.rationale: 小白首次进入需要教学，但老手再看是噪音；localStorage 记住 dismissed 后永久消失，配合 ❓ 按钮可随时恢复
tradeoffs: key 'vcp-panel:agent-tools-hint-dismissed' 固定命名（未来若重写提示内容需手动清 localStorage 或换 key）

summary: 占位符三态识别 + 一键修复 + Emoji 分类 + Toolbox 集成

decisions.title: 三态健康度 chip 系统（ok/missing-plugin/unknown）
decisions.rationale: 小白用户装插件后无法知道哪些占位符已生效；橙色虚边 + 一键修复按钮直接消除 90% 幽灵引用问题
tradeoffs: 多拉 /admin_api/plugins + /admin_api/placeholder-registry 两次请求
换来可视化健康度监控

decisions.title: Emoji 分类独立识别（{{XXX表情包}} 黄色）
decisions.rationale: 表情包占位符命名惯例清晰（endsWith 表情包），给独立 kind 让用户一眼看到是表情包变量而非普通系统变量
side_effects: classify 里特殊 case + 独立色系，不走 VCP 工具蓝色

decisions.title: 正则扩展支持中文 + toolbox:alias
decisions.rationale: 宝宝 Agent 提示词大量用中文占位符（{{Nova表情包}}），老正则 [A-Za-z_][\w]* 不匹配中文整个 chip 渲染失败; toolbox: 前缀带冒号也不匹配
decisions.fix: 扩展为 [A-Za-z_一-龥][\w一-龥]* + (?:toolbox:)? 可选前缀

decisions.title: 一键修复按钮走 /plugin-store/install API
decisions.rationale: 借用本体 install 热加载协议（_registerSinglePlugin）；装完后重新拉 placeholders，chip 立即从橙变绿
side_effects: 依赖本体新加的 install→register 闭环

decisions.title: AgentManagerView 健康度卡片 + dismissible 提示
decisions.rationale: 提示词编辑 tab 顶部显示全文扫描结果，按插件分组，一键安装；dismissible 避免老手噪音
tradeoffs: localStorage 记忆 dismissed 状态

decisions.title: vite.config.ts 加 /pw= 代理
decisions.rationale: ImageServer 图床路径在主服务 6005，Panel dev 5173 页面要显示表情包缩略图必须代理；生产环境 adminServer 也加了同样代理
side_effects: dev/release 图床访问路径一致

bugs.symptom: {{Nova表情包}} chip 不渲染，只显示字面量
bugs.root_cause: textToHtml 正则 [A-Za-z_][\w]* 不匹配中文
bugs.lesson: 国际化友好的正则必须覆盖 CJK

bugs.symptom: loadInstalledPlugins 从 /admin_api/plugins 拿到的数据 installedPluginNames 是空 Set
bugs.root_cause: /admin_api/plugins 返回纯数组，代码写成 r.data || r.plugins || [] 走 fallback 到空
bugs.lesson: API 响应结构不统一时需兼容多种包装

summary: feat(config): Global Config V2 rewrite + rose-pink glass morphism + TVS editor polish

decisions.title: Global Config V2: BaseConfigView generic .env parser → GlobalConfigView schema-driven 7-Tab structure
decisions.rationale: 138 env fields in flat list is hostile to new users; categorized 7 Tabs with purpose-built controls (slider / chip / model picker) provides leap in usability
tradeoffs: New env fields need manual registration in configSchema.ts
Unregistered fields only visible in raw mode fallback

rejected_alternatives.option: Auto group by env comment headers
rejected_alternatives.reason: Comment grouping is coarse; cant define per-field control type / validation / suggestions
Project has no JSON Schema ecosystem; overengineering for scope

decisions.title: ModelSelect: Teleport centered modal with glass chip list
decisions.rationale: Earlier "popover below input" design got clipped by parent container and felt cramped when selecting from 40+ models
tradeoffs: Modal covers page content during selection

rejected_alternatives.reason: No search, no category grouping, ugly on large lists
Pushes down sibling fields, disrupts form flow

decisions.title: SliderField: custom div track instead of browser default range track
decisions.rationale: Browser default range has harsh square edge where filled portion ends meeting the circular thumb; custom track + absolute filled div allows seamless glass-rounded-pill + round-disc thumb
tradeoffs: Extra DOM layer
Native range ARIA affordances bypassed

rejected_alternatives.reason: Harsh transition between fill and thumb violated glass aesthetic

decisions.title: Dream agent add: inline popover picking from agent_map
decisions.rationale: Previous BaseModal with "input English ID + Chinese name" was tedious; user should pick from existing agents directly with avatar preview
tradeoffs: Popover position needs careful absolute positioning within dream-agents-section

rejected_alternatives.reason: Adding agent should be lightweight, not warrant full modal
Users would mistype; agent list already exists in agent_map.json

decisions.title: Dream agent removal uses delete editedValues[key] instead of = ''
decisions.rationale: dreamAgentGroups computed scans editedValues key presence to decide rendering; empty string still counts as present, keeping deleted cards visible
side_effects: Save logic handles delete by omitting from envItems rebuild

decisions.title: Field grid: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(360px, 1fr)) → repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) with align-items: start
decisions.rationale: auto-fill on wide screens packs 3-4 columns making half fields tiny; also boolean short cards stretch to match tall cards creating empty space
tradeoffs: Ultra-wide screens (4K+) have less space utilization
Fixed 2-column loses some flexibility

rejected_alternatives.reason: Makes boolean cards tall with empty whitespace
Didnt fix the wide-screen column explosion

decisions.title: Remove ChinaModel1 / ChinaModel1Cot / HIDE_NONSTREAM_REASONING from schema
decisions.rationale: User clarified these are model-behavior fields already managed on Model Prompts page (SarModel/SarPrompt mechanism); having them in Global Config too would be dual-source
tradeoffs: Fields still live in config.env and are read by server.js; global config just doesnt render them; raw mode still shows them

decisions.title: VECTORDB_DIMENSION: select → integer with placeholder
decisions.rationale: User wants to support non-standard embedding models with custom dimensions (not only 768/1536/3072)
tradeoffs: No validation that dimension matches embedding model output; users must match themselves

decisions.title: NewAPI Monitor fields reorder: full/half/full/half → full/full/half+half
decisions.rationale: Old order left orphan half-width fields with empty-half next to them; new order pairs the two half fields together at the end

decisions.title: Rose-pink glass morphism unification across the config view
decisions.rationale: Matches existing MigrationView / BackupView styled in fe3aa23; rgba white translucent + rose-pink accent + glass-blur creates consistent visual hierarchy
tradeoffs: Dark mode contrast might need adjustments (TODO)
side_effects: All field components (Slider / TagInput / ModelSelect / FieldRenderer) rewritten with matching token palette

decisions.title: TvsEditorView type-aware color coding (Tar blue / Var green / Sar purple / Other gray)
decisions.rationale: File cards previously indistinguishable; color-coding by env prefix makes scanning faster
tradeoffs: Pure style change, no functional impact

decisions.title: Model select pick button switched from pink gradient to glass ghost style
decisions.rationale: User feedback: pick button more saturated than surrounding buttons caused visual hierarchy conflict
tradeoffs: Less prominence for the pick action; mitigated by obvious "选择" text + list icon

bugs.symptom: Knowledge Base Behavior section + NewAPI Monitor section card layout looked ugly/uneven
bugs.root_cause: NewAPI fields ordered full/half/full/half leaving orphan half-width fields next to empty half; grid auto-fill on wide screens packed 3-4 columns; boolean short cards got stretched to match tall integer/url cards
bugs.fix: Reordered NewAPI fields to pair halves (full/full/half+half); grid to repeat(2) + align-items: start
bugs.lesson: Responsive grid needs max-column constraint when using half/full semantics; otherwise auto-fill breaks pairing intent

bugs.symptom: Dream agent delete button did nothing visible
bugs.root_cause: Old removeDreamAgent set editedValues[key] = '' but dreamAgentGroups computed checks key presence; empty string still resolves as present, card stays rendered
bugs.fix: Use delete editedValues[key] to truly remove; guard rendering with at-least-one-non-empty check
bugs.lesson: When dirty-tracking computed depends on key existence, clearing must actually delete the property, not just set empty

bugs.symptom: Model select "选择" button more saturated than surrounding UI
bugs.root_cause: Used linear-gradient(button-bg) for primary style but all neighbors (inputs, ghost buttons) were translucent white; broke visual hierarchy
bugs.fix: Changed to rgba(255,255,255,0.55) ghost style; hover reveals pink tint
bugs.lesson: Primary-button styling should match visual weight of neighbors; match context not global convention

bugs.symptom: Model Prompts page was blank; user said 1p (production) had entries
bugs.root_cause: Backend: adminServer never initialized sarPromptManager + local sarprompt.json was [] (migration produced empty when config.env v2 had no Sar fields). Not a Panel bug, backend fix was applied in main repo commit d147c63
bugs.fix: See main repo commit d147c63 for ensureInitialized + DEFAULT_SAR_PRESETS
bugs.lesson: Cross-repo backend/frontend coupling requires verifying both sides when user reports "data loss"

tests.notes: Passes multiple iterations; no type errors, GlobalConfigView chunk ~61kB gzip 20kB
